metadata.title: The Kitchen That Smelled Like Mint Tea
metadata.speaker: Noura El Idrissi

beats.title: Hands that taught patience
beats.content: She said a meal tastes better when you cook for someone specific.

beats.title: Friday light in the courtyard
beats.content: Steam rose from the couscous while sunlight crossed the old tiles.

beats.title: Couscous for the whole house
beats.content: She layered vegetables by color and never rushed the broth.
